findings_addressed.description: Skip acc scoring for evidence-only queries (q.answers empty) — avoids inverting answerer_accuracy when an LLM is configured.
NaiveRAGAdapter: store and return document bodies so answerer gets real context.
findings_addressed.fix: Added self._bodies dict in __init__, populated alongside tokenization loop, returned in retrieve() hits

findings_addressed.description: Strict all-of recall (any→all) — ADR spec; multi-hop questions need all evidence docs.
findings_addressed.fix: Changed `any(g in retrieved for g in q.gold_doc_ids)` to `all(...)`

findings_addressed.description: Wrap Mem0 ingest() in try/except — record blocker instead of aborting CLI.
findings_addressed.fix: Wrapped mem0.ingest(documents) in try/except; on failure appends mem0-oss-unavailable blocker and skips adding to systems

findings_addressed.description: Delete stale DB file before opening — reruns always start from clean ingest.
findings_addressed.fix: Added `if db_path.exists(): db_path.unlink()` before Engine.open() in _build_fathomdb()
